arts.ttl: EFL LIVE on Sky! Leeds, Sheff U & Wrexham face crunch promotion clashes
arts.sum: Leeds looked to be slipping, but enjoyed a massive win at Middlesbrough on Tuesday night as the other two slipped. In the last seven days, Sheffield United, Leeds and Burnley have all enjoyed the joy of being at the summit.

arts.ttl: Saturday's League One predictions including Wigan Athletic vs. Wrexham
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's League One fixtures, including Wigan Athletic vs. Wrexham.

arts.ttl: Only Wrexham-style Hollywood money can bridge Premier League gap after meek relegation battle
arts.sum: Last season in the Premier League, all three promoted teams were relegated straight back down to the Championship and the same looks likely to happen in this campaign - showing how hard it is to bridge the gap between the two divisions

arts.ttl: Wrexham midfielder's opinion on Ryan Reynolds shows what he's really like away from cameras
arts.sum: Wrexham are closing in on promotion from League One and A-list co-owner Ryan Reynolds gave the players an inspirational speech before one of their recent matches

arts.ttl: 'I was in Ryan Reynolds' Wrexham huddle before match – I won't repeat what he told us'
arts.sum: Wrexham midfielder Ollie Rathbone has lifted the lid on a speech given by Ryan Reynolds to his team's players ahead of a crunch game in their race for League One promotion

arts.ttl: When can Wrexham be promoted from League One?
arts.sum: After back-to-back promotions, Wrexham have been enjoying another stellar season, sitting in second place in League One as they bid for a place in the Championship.

arts.ttl: Preview: Wigan Athletic vs. Wrexham - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's League One clash between Wigan Athletic and Wrexham, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: 'It's been massive' - How Wigan Athletic loan has brought best out of Dale Taylor
arts.sum: They say never fall in love with a loan player: but that couldn’t be further from the truth for Wigan Athletic fans.

Wigan might have gone five games without winning, but Burton's desperate form means they're edging towards safety. The Latics, who are seven points clear of the relegation zone, have a dreadful recor...

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic boss provides early team news v Wrexham with duo back in contention
arts.sum: Wigan Athletic manager Ryan Lowe has confirmed Chris Sze and Ronan Darcy are back in contention to feature against Wrexham on Saturday afternoon.
